about.story1: I'm Adhamjon Sodiqov, a frontend developer passionate about creating modern web interfaces.
about.story2: My goal is to build professional digital products that create a memorable user experience.
about.story3: I work on real-world projects using React, JavaScript, and UI/UX design.
about.story4: Through the "Adam Voyage" project, I gained experience in product architecture and design systems.
about.story5: Every project is a new opportunity for me to grow and improve.
about.story6: My ultimate goal is to build a globally recognized IT brand.
